name: CLIENT_HELLO
description: Control-channel handshake: client hello (cleartext).

name: SERVER_HELLO
description: Control-channel handshake: server hello (cleartext).

name: SERVER_AUTH
description: Control-channel handshake: server authentication (AEAD-sealed under the s-hs handshake key).

name: CLIENT_AUTH
description: Control-channel handshake: client authentication (AEAD-sealed under the c-hs handshake key).

name: MEMORY_EVICT
description: Mark an identified record evicted -- soft-removed from active retrieval, retained so it can be revived.

name: MEMORY_REVIVE
description: Restore a previously evicted record to active retrieval.

name: MEMORY_CREATE_REQ
description: Write a new persistent-state memory record.

name: MEMORY_CREATE_RESULT
description: Success reply to a create; echoes the request's correlation token.

name: MEMORY_READ_REQ
description: Return the current state of one identified memory record.

name: MEMORY_READ_RESULT
description: Success reply to a read; carries the identified record.

name: MEMORY_UPDATE_REQ
description: Change an existing memory record in place.

name: MEMORY_UPDATE_RESULT
description: Success reply to an update.

name: MEMORY_DELETE_REQ
description: Remove a memory record, ending its persistence.

name: MEMORY_DELETE_RESULT
description: Success reply to a delete.

name: MEMORY_RETRIEVE_REQ
description: List/retrieve a ranked, provenance-bearing set of memory records.

name: MEMORY_RETRIEVE_RESULT
description: A bounded ranked result set delivered in a single frame.

name: MEMORY_RETRIEVE_STREAM_DATA
description: One page of a large ranked result set; final is not set.

name: MEMORY_RETRIEVE_STREAM_END
description: Terminates a streamed retrieval; final is set.

name: MEMORY_STATUS_REQ
description: Query store health and advertised capabilities.

name: MEMORY_STATUS_RESULT
description: Store health and capability reply.

name: MEMORY_ERROR
description: Structured failure for any request; echoes the correlation token and carries a Memory error code.

name: CAP_TOKEN_PRESENT
description: A holder presents a capability_token (with its delegation chain) to the peer, out of band from a specific operation.

name: CAP_TOKEN_ACCEPT
description: Success reply to CAP_TOKEN_PRESENT; records the token as presented and echoes the correlation token.

name: CAP_TOKEN_CHALLENGE
description: A verifier challenges the holder to prove current possession of a token by signing a fresh nonce.

name: CAP_TOKEN_PROOF
description: Success reply to CAP_TOKEN_CHALLENGE; carries the holder's proof over the challenge nonce.

name: CAP_ISSUE_REQ
description: Grant a new authority -- a capability held by the issuer -- to a peer.

name: CAP_ISSUE_RESULT
description: Success reply to an issuance; carries the issued capability_token and echoes the request's correlation token.

name: CAP_DELEGATE_REQ
description: Convey a held capability onward to another peer, optionally attenuated.

name: CAP_DELEGATE_RESULT
description: Success reply to a delegation; carries the delegated child capability_token.

name: CAP_REVOKE_REQ
description: Withdraw a previously issued or delegated capability, ending the authority it conveyed.

name: CAP_REVOKE_RESULT
description: Success reply to a revocation.

name: CAP_LOOKUP_REQ
description: Resolve or query a capability -- its existence, current status, or the set a subject holds.

name: CAP_LOOKUP_RESULT
description: A bounded, paginated result set delivered in a single frame.

name: CAP_ERROR
description: Structured failure for any request; echoes the correlation token and carries a Capability error code.

name: IMMUNE_GOSSIP_ADVERTISE
description: Propagate a set of defensive-gossip item descriptors (each an item_id + version), advertising them by digest (pull-mode) or pushing their full bodies inline.

name: IMMUNE_GOSSIP_ACK
description: Reply to an ADVERTISE or a RETRACT; echoes the correlation token and reports which advertised items are already held (suppressed) and which are still wanted pulled in full.

name: IMMUNE_GOSSIP_PULL_REQ
description: Request the full body of one or more advertised items the receiver lacks or holds at a staler version.

name: IMMUNE_GOSSIP_PULL_RESULT
description: Deliver the requested full gossip-item bodies; echoes the PULL_REQ's correlation token.

name: IMMUNE_GOSSIP_RETRACT
description: Withdraw a previously propagated item (for example a false positive), suppressing its further propagation from a stated version onward.

name: IMMUNE_REPORT_REQ
description: Report a detected operational or security irregularity (anomaly) to the peer.

name: IMMUNE_REPORT_RESULT
description: Success reply to a report; carries the receiver's disposition and echoes the request's correlation token.

name: IMMUNE_ERROR
description: Structured failure for any Immune request; echoes the correlation token and carries an Immune error code.

name: SETTLE_BATCH_COMMIT_REQ
description: Commit to a batch of settlements by a single opaque commitment value.

name: SETTLE_BATCH_COMMIT_RESULT
description: Success reply to a batch commitment; echoes the correlation token.

name: SETTLE_INTENT_REQ
description: Record that a bilateral, agent-to-agent obligation between the two peers is settled.

name: SETTLE_INTENT_RESULT
description: Success reply to a settlement intent; echoes the request's correlation token.

name: RECEIPT_REQ
description: Return the receipt that evidences an identified settlement.

name: RECEIPT_RESULT
description: Success reply to a receipt request; carries the settlement receipt.

name: SETTLE_ERROR
description: Structured failure for any request; echoes the correlation token and carries a Settlement error code.

name: TELEMETRY_REPORT
description: A batch of operational metric samples, discrete events, and/or health statements pushed one-way -- standalone, or under a subscription where it consumes credit.

name: TELEMETRY_SUBSCRIBE
description: Request a continuing stream of REPORT batches matching a selector, carrying an initial credit grant.

name: TELEMETRY_SUB_ACK
description: Accepts a subscription; echoes corr; returns the granted terms (subscription id, effective credit, accepted reporting classes).

name: TELEMETRY_UNSUBSCRIBE
description: Cancels a subscription; echoes corr; no reply (idempotent).

name: TELEMETRY_CREDIT
description: Consumer replenishes per-subscription report credit (backpressure); echoes corr.

name: TELEMETRY_ERROR
description: Structured failure of a subscribe or credit request; echoes the corr of the request it answers.

name: STREAM_OPEN
description: Opens a sub-stream; carries its sub_stream_id, the opener's initial receive window, and a content-type hint.

name: STREAM_DATA
description: Carries one chunk of sub-stream octets at an explicit absolute byte offset; MAY set fin to signal end-of-data for this direction.

name: STREAM_CLOSE
description: Graceful half-close of one direction of a sub-stream, stating that direction's final octet count.

name: STREAM_RESET
description: Abrupt teardown of BOTH directions of a sub-stream, carrying a reset error code.

name: STREAM_WINDOW_UPDATE
description: Grants per-sub-stream flow-control credit as a new absolute cumulative receive offset.

name: BRIDGE_REQUEST
description: A foreign request that expects a reply.

name: BRIDGE_RESPONSE
description: A successful reply; correlation echoes the request.

name: BRIDGE_ERROR
description: A failed reply; carries the foreign error object.

name: BRIDGE_NOTIFY
description: A one-way message; no reply is expected or permitted.

name: BRIDGE_STREAM_DATA
description: One chunk of a streamed reply; correlation echoes the request.

name: BRIDGE_STREAM_END
description: Terminates a stream; final is set.

name: COMMERCE_MANDATE_CREATE_REQ
description: Issue a new payment mandate (authorization-to-pay artifact).

name: COMMERCE_MANDATE_CREATE_RESULT
description: Success reply to a mandate issuance; echoes the request's correlation token.

name: COMMERCE_MANDATE_READ_REQ
description: Return the current state of one identified payment mandate.

name: COMMERCE_MANDATE_READ_RESULT
description: Success reply to a read; carries the identified mandate.

name: COMMERCE_MANDATE_REVOKE_REQ
description: Revoke an outstanding payment mandate, ending its authorization.

name: COMMERCE_MANDATE_REVOKE_RESULT
description: Success reply to a revoke.

name: COMMERCE_MANDATE_STATUS_REQ
description: Query the lifecycle state of one identified mandate.

name: COMMERCE_MANDATE_STATUS_RESULT
description: Mandate lifecycle-state reply.

name: COMMERCE_INTENT_PROPOSE_REQ
description: Propose a multi-party settlement intent (named parties and payment legs).

name: COMMERCE_INTENT_PROPOSE_RESULT
description: Success reply to a proposal; carries the intent identifier and initial state.

name: COMMERCE_INTENT_RESPOND_REQ
description: Accept, reject, or counter a previously proposed settlement intent.

name: COMMERCE_INTENT_RESPOND_RESULT
description: Success reply to a response; carries the resulting intent state.

name: COMMERCE_INTENT_STATUS_REQ
description: Query the state of one identified settlement intent.

name: COMMERCE_INTENT_STATUS_RESULT
description: Settlement-intent state reply.

name: COMMERCE_ERROR
description: Structured failure for any request; echoes the correlation token and carries a Commerce error code.

name: INTERACT_EVENT
description: Convey a user-interface event to the peer: an agent surfacing an event to the human's client, or the human's client returning an interaction event to the agent.

name: INTERACT_EVENT_ACK
description: Acknowledges an INTERACT_EVENT that requested acknowledgement; echoes the request's correlation token.

name: INTERACT_PROMPT_REQ
description: Prompt the human for input and await the human's response.

name: INTERACT_PROMPT_RESULT
description: The human's response to a prompt; echoes the correlation token.

name: INTERACT_APPROVAL_REQ
description: Request a human decision to approve or deny a described action.

name: INTERACT_APPROVAL_RESULT
description: The human's completed decision (granted or denied); echoes the correlation token.

name: INTERACT_CANCEL
description: Withdraw an outstanding prompt or approval request, by its correlation token.

name: INTERACT_ERROR
description: Structured failure or hold for any request; echoes the correlation token and carries an Interaction error code, including the approval-held non-success outcome.

name: WORKFLOW_SUBMIT_REQ
description: Delegate a unit of agentic work for execution; carries the work descriptor and its declared side-effect class.

name: WORKFLOW_SUBMIT_RESULT
description: Acceptance reply to a submit; assigns the durable task_id and the task's initial lifecycle state. Echoes the request's correlation token.

name: WORKFLOW_STATUS_REQ
description: Query the current lifecycle state of a delegated task.

name: WORKFLOW_STATUS_RESULT
description: Current-state reply to a status query.

name: WORKFLOW_CANCEL_REQ
description: Request cancellation of an in-flight task.

name: WORKFLOW_CANCEL_RESULT
description: Cancellation reply carrying the task's resulting lifecycle state.

name: WORKFLOW_STEP_EVENT
description: Unsolicited progress event for a running task; correlated to the task by task_id.

name: WORKFLOW_COMPLETE
description: Unsolicited terminal event carrying the task's final state and output; correlated to the task by task_id.

name: WORKFLOW_ERROR
description: Structured failure for a request; echoes the correlation token and carries a Workflow error code.

name: KNOWLEDGE_QUERY_REQ
description: Issue a retrieval query; request a ranked, provenance-bearing result set.

name: KNOWLEDGE_QUERY_RESULT
description: A bounded ranked result set delivered in a single frame; echoes the request's correlation token.

name: KNOWLEDGE_QUERY_STREAM_DATA
description: One page of a large ranked result set; final is not set.

name: KNOWLEDGE_QUERY_STREAM_END
description: Terminates a streamed retrieval; final is set.

name: KNOWLEDGE_SUBSCRIBE_REQ
description: Subscribe to a continuing (standing) query; carries an initial credit grant.

name: KNOWLEDGE_SUBSCRIBE_ACK
description: Accepts a subscription; echoes corr; returns the subscription id and effective credit.

name: KNOWLEDGE_UPDATE
description: A pushed ranked-result update under a subscription; echoes corr, names its sub_id, one-way.

name: KNOWLEDGE_CREDIT
description: Consumer replenishes per-subscription update credit (backpressure); echoes corr.

name: KNOWLEDGE_UNSUBSCRIBE
description: Cancels a subscription; echoes corr; no reply (idempotent).

name: KNOWLEDGE_ERROR
description: Structured failure for any request; echoes the correlation token and carries a Knowledge error code.
